description: Expand question bank from 1,000 to 10,000 questions. Keep existing 1000, add 9000 more. Balanced distribution: 2500 A, 2500 B, 2500 C, 2500 D. Approximately equal across 18 topics (~555 per topic). Split across multiple files due to size.
steps: Create question bank part files (question_bank_part2.py through question_bank_part10.py) with ~1000 questions each
Update question_bank.py to import from all part files and combine into QUESTION_BANK with 10000 total questions
Update module docstring to say 10000 questions
Verify balanced answer distribution (2500 each A/B/C/D) and topic distribution (~555 per topic)
Run tests to verify everything still works
acceptance_criteria: Answer distribution is exactly 2500 A, 2500 B, 2500 C, 2500 D
Topic distribution is approximately 555 per topic (18 topics)
All questions are unique and curriculum-aligned
database.py still imports from QUESTION_BANK successfully
verification: Run: python -c "from app.question_bank import QUESTION_BANK; from collections import Counter; print(len(QUESTION_BANK)); c = Counter(q['correct_answer'] for q in QUESTION_BANK); print(c); assert len(QUESTION_BANK) == 10000; assert all(v == 2500 for v in c.values())"

blocked_reason.detail: Generating 9000 unique, curriculum-aligned Python questions requires extensive domain content that exceeds practical tool execution limits. The approach is proven (python_setup topic achieved exactly 500 questions with perfect 125/125/125/125 A/B/C/D distribution using parametric templates). Each topic needs 500 unique questions with varied patterns (install/uninstall/upgrade/purpose/info/cache for python_setup, output-prediction/concepts/operators/built-ins for variables_datatypes). Currently generated 767/9000 questions (1 complete topic + 1 partial). Need to continue generating remaining 16 topics with same parametric approach. Each topic requires ~80+ domain-specific subjects with 6 question patterns each to reach 500.

findings: Proven approach: parametric templates with 80+ domain subjects x 6 patterns = 500+ questions per topic. python_setup achieved exactly 500 questions with perfect 125A/125B/125C/125D distribution. Used package metadata (name, purpose, category) to generate install/uninstall/upgrade/what-is/check/cache questions. For variables_datatypes, used output-prediction patterns with Python expressions. File gen_data_partial.json contains 767 verified questions (500 python_setup + 267 variables_datatypes). Each remaining topic needs similar domain-specific content defined as parametric data.
